name: Linear
description: The gold standard for SaaS design — radical simplicity masking profound engineering depth. Dark mode done absolutely right.

name: Vercel
description: Terminal aesthetics elevated to art. Vercel's site speaks fluent developer while being unmistakably premium.

name: Stripe
description: A decade of refinement in every pixel. Stripe has defined what world-class fintech design looks and feels like.

name: Framer
description: Eating your own dog food, beautifully. Framer's site is itself a showcase of what Framer can produce.

name: Notion
description: Flexibility without chaos. Notion's marketing site makes infinite customisation feel inevitable, not overwhelming.

name: Arc Browser
description: An invitation into a different internet. Arc's site mirrors the bold ambition of its rethink-everything browser.

name: Superhuman
description: Dark luxury meets performance philosophy. Superhuman's aesthetic defined an entire generation of SaaS marketing.

name: Craft
description: Apple-adjacent refinement — Craft's site is a masterclass in premium software marketing without the arrogance.

name: Read.cv
description: Design restraint as a statement. Read.cv proves that less isn't just more — it's the whole point.

name: Cosmos
description: A moodboard for the entire internet. Cosmos' dark grid aesthetic perfectly mirrors its role as a visual discovery platform.

name: Figma
description: The design tool that designed its way to dominance — both product and brand identity are lessons in coherence.

name: Resend
description: Developer tooling with editorial sensibility. Resend proves that docs-first products can have world-class visual identity.
